posts.title: Running K8s Cluster in Tailscale
posts.content: Running a high availavility cluster across the east coast with a few friends. Underneath a VPN, using an opensource version of tailscale.

posts.title: VLAs with Long and Short-Term Memory
posts.content: Multi-Scale Embodied Memory (MEM) gives our models both long-term and short-term memory, enabling complex tasks longer than ten minutes.
